dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4250 IS: Sport Fish Restoration, Recreational Boating Safety, and Wildlife Restoration Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Sullivan (for himself, Ms. Cantwell, Mr. Wicker, Mr. Peters, Mr. Sheehy, Ms. Rosen, Mrs. Blackburn, and Ms. Klobuchar) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation

form.official-title: To amend the Dingell-Johnson Sport Fish Restoration Act with respect to sport fish restoration and recreational boating safety, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Sport Fish Restoration, Recreational Boating Safety, and Wildlife Restoration Act of 2026.

section.header: Reauthorization of Dingell-Johnson Sport Fish Restoration Act

subsection.text: Section 4 of the Dingell-Johnson Sport Fish Restoration Act (16 U.S.C. 777c) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a), in the matter preceding paragraph (1), by striking 2026 and inserting 2031; and

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (1)(A), in the first sentence, by striking 2026 and inserting 2031; and
in paragraph (2)(A), in the first sentence, by striking 2026 and inserting 2031.

subsection.text: Section 14(e) of the Dingell-Johnson Sport Fish Restoration Act (16 U.S.C. 777m(e)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in the matter preceding paragraph (1), by striking Not more than $1,200,000 of each and inserting Each; and
in paragraph (1), in the matter preceding subparagraph (A), by striking $200,000 and inserting The greater of 0.0375 percent of such appropriation or $200,000.
